top_tweets.text: It’s great that behind the scenes footage is becoming an extension of the final product itself rather than merely supplementary content as a response to AI fatigue.
top_tweets.author: dearvotion
top_tweets.name: N
top_tweets.summary_zh: 幕後花絮內容正從「附加素材」升級為「產品本身的延伸」，是對 AI 疲勞的回應。這趨勢反映了使用者對真實製作過程的渴望。

top_tweets.text: The highest and most important form of design is actually pure transmutation of human pain and suffering.
top_tweets.author: garrytan
top_tweets.name: Garry Tan
top_tweets.summary_zh: 設計的最高形式是純粹的人類痛苦與苦難的轉化。強調設計應直面並解決真實的人性問題。

top_tweets.text:
Wow I’m seeing Claude generated webpages everywhere. 

they’ve all got the same design structure.
top_tweets.author: trikcode
top_tweets.name: Wise
top_tweets.summary_zh: Claude 生成的網頁到處可見，它們都有相同的設計結構。反映 AI 工具帶來的設計同質化現象值得警惕。

top_tweets.text: If you're a designer or a design engineer, you might often end up building micro apps for your creative workflow - branding assets, animations, WebGL effects. BUT to make the app itself look pretty takes quite a lot of work. Laggy controls, weird dropdowns, ugly sliders, https://t.co/MScqR2UNGI
top_tweets.author: alex_barashkov
top_tweets.name: Alex Barashkov
top_tweets.summary_zh: 設計師或設計工程師常需為創意工作流建立微型應用，但讓應用本身看起來美觀需要大量工作。指出工具類產品的 UI 品質門檻。

top_tweets.text: I’m quickly realising the bar for design opinions on this app is “I have eyes”
top_tweets.author: benjitaylor
top_tweets.name: Benji Taylor
top_tweets.summary_zh: 推特上設計評論的門檻已降到「我有眼睛」的程度。諷刺社群媒體上缺乏專業基礎的設計討論氾濫。

top_tweets.text:
Hold up so
>Sumi makes tweet on Shylily insinuating she got blocked by her for design similarities
>Shylily reaches out to offer clarifications and explain that she might have done this because she saw Sumi entangled in some drama
>Sumi posts part of this dm and declares the https://t.co/M4OtW4JoiP
top_tweets.author: RimaEvenstar
top_tweets.name: Rima Evenstar
top_tweets.summary_zh: iOS 27 將包含 Weather、Safari、Image Playground 等應用及系統標籤欄的設計變更。蘋果持續進行系統級 UI 改版。

top_tweets.text:
CZR is built as a system.

Trading, automation, payments, wealth management -
each product designed to connect, not sit in isolation.

Move between them without breaking flow. https://t.co/Fo7HiUxfQi
top_tweets.author: czrexchange
top_tweets.name: CZR
top_tweets.summary_zh: CZR 以系統化方式構建，交易、自動化、支付、財富管理各產品設計為互聯而非孤立。強調產品間無縫銜接的重要性。

top_tweets.author: WebDesignMuseum
top_tweets.name: Web Design Museum
top_tweets.summary_zh: 2005 年的 Windows Mobile 網站設計回顧。可作為行動優先設計演變的歷史參考。

top_tweets.text:
Other Games: we need our characters to have substance. Their entire gameplay and design must have a logical back story with enough depth to explain every single thing they wear and do. It should be true to our world.

Marvel Rivals: uhhh fuck it blushing dinosaur with laser beam
top_tweets.author: Skooch
top_tweets.name: Skooch
top_tweets.summary_zh: 其他遊戲追求角色設定的邏輯深度，Marvel Rivals 則是「管他的，會臉紅的恐龍發射雷射」。對比不同產品設計哲學的幽默觀察。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Keeby for Windows
top_products.author: Adrian Angelo Abelarde (Belards)
top_products.tagline: Satisfying mechanical keyboard sounds, now on Windows
top_products.summary_zh: 為 Windows 系統提供機械式鍵盤音效模擬的工具，讓打字時能發出擬真的鍵盤聲響。

top_products.title: EmailTemple
top_products.author: Marc-Aurele Legoux
top_products.tagline: The AI studio for creating high conversion, on-brand emails
top_products.summary_zh: 運用 AI 技術協助製作高轉換率且符合品牌風格的電子郵件內容，適合行銷人員使用。

top_products.title: Free AI SEO Auditor
top_products.author: Yahia Bakour
top_products.tagline: Audit your site for the AI search era. 100% Open Source
top_products.summary_zh: 針對 AI 搜尋時代需求的網站 SEO 檢測工具，100% 開源且免費提供使用。

top_products.title: Hopper
top_products.author: Chris Messina
top_products.tagline: First agentic development environment for mainframe/COBOL
top_products.summary_zh: 首個針對大型主機與 COBOL 語言設計的 agentic 開發環境，協助現代化舊有系統開發流程。

top_products.title: display.dev
top_products.author: Ott Ilves
top_products.tagline: Publish agent-generated HTML behind company auth
top_products.summary_zh: 讓企業能在公司驗證機制後方發布由 AI agent 生成的 HTML 內容的平台。

top_products.title: Khaos Brain
top_products.author: Yingxu Liu
top_products.tagline: Local predictive memory for AI agents
top_products.summary_zh: 為 AI agent 提供本地端預測性記憶功能，提升智能代理的決策與學習能力。
